violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Ice machine to be cleaned and sanitized within time allotted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Meatballs, Eggplant were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Walk-in was adjusted during inspection and returned to 40 deg F. Products were returned to 41 deg F prior to end of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The ceilings throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, specifically the ceilings above the production area and walk-in cooler. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per person in charge, the firm's certified food safety manager was not on site and establishment was preparing, handling, and serving TCS food at time of inspection. Firm to register additional fod safety manager(s). New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Per food employee responsible for cleaning the slicer, sanitizer is not applied to slicer consistently at the correct frequency (at least every 4 hours). Slicer not to be used until it has been washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Inspector reviewed proper cleaning and sanitizing of slicer with staff at time of inspection. English Deli Slicer Cleaning and Sanitizing Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Bags of bread and containers of bread crumbs are improperly labeled. Inspector reviewed labeling requirements with owner. English Food Labels Poster Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
All in-use bags of flour were observed stored on the floor in the baking production area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The wood wall next to the handwashing sink in the baking area has deteriorated and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2023
